mapper.insert: insert into USER_AUTHORITY (ID, CMN_MEMO, MODULECODE, MODULENAME, ISCREATER, USERNAME, USERID, CMN_NAME, CREATE_TIME) values (#{userAuthority.id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userAuthority.cmnMemo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userAuthority.moduleCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userAuthority.moduleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userAuthority.isCreater,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userAuthority.userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userAuthority.userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userAuthority.cmnName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, date_format(now(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) on duplicate key update CMN_MEMO = #{userAuthority.cmnMemo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MODULECODE = #{userAuthority.moduleCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MODULENAME = #{userAuthority.moduleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ISCREATER = #{userAuthority.isCreater,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, USERNAME = #{userAuthority.userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CMN_NAME = #{userAuthority.cmnName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CREATE_TIME = date_format(now(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
